backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no logic, serving as a placeholder since the project is a static informational website.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three UI features: removing the A11y icon from the header, darkening header text labels, and applying high-contrast dark text colors site-wide, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, pages, hooks, contexts, and configuration files for the DSOUZA BANK React application.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for background, foreground, cards, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the DSOUZA BANK React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five page routes (Home, Services, About, Neo, Contact) wrapped in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and multiple context providers.
frontend/src/components/AccessibilityCon: Accessibility controls component providing a font-size dropdown (small/medium/large) and a high-contrast toggle button using the AccessibilityContext.
frontend/src/components/BrandStatementBa: Decorative brand statement section with a headline, stats grid, and CTA buttons on a deep-navy background, using MotionReveal for animated entry.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotDialog.ts: Interactive AI chatbot dialog supporting text and voice input via Web Speech API, with a rule-based bot response system, typing indicator, and text-to-speech output.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotPanel.tsx: A sliding chatbot panel component (DSOUZA AI) that supports multilingual conversations (English, Hindi, Marathi, Kannada, Tamil) with font size controls, keyword-based bot responses, and a chat message interface.
frontend/src/components/EmergencySecurit: A floating emergency button that opens a confirmation dialog allowing users to instantly freeze cards, disable UPI, and alert the security team, with a loading state and success toast notification.
frontend/src/components/ExperienceSelect: A section component that lets users select a personalized banking experience (Rural, Senior, Digital, Business) from styled cards, updating global experience context with animated selection feedback.
frontend/src/components/FamilyFinancialP: A multi-widget financial planner component featuring a home loan tracker, an interactive education cost calculator with sliders, and a tax-saving dashboard showing investment progress across instruments like PPF and ELSS.
frontend/src/components/FinancialHealthS: A financial health dashboard that displays animated circular progress rings for savings, investment, insurance, and emergency fund scores, along with AI-generated prioritized recommendations for improvement.
frontend/src/components/FinancialWellbei: Renders a dashboard card displaying four financial wellbeing metrics (investment growth, savings goal, insurance cover, retirement plan) as interactive grid items with hover animations and color-coded icons.
A stub component that renders nothing; the floating chatbot trigger has been relocated to the Header component, and this file is kept only for reference.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site-wide footer with brand info, contact details, grouped navigation links (services, company, support), social media icons, and legal/compliance text.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, font-size accessibility controls, language switcher, voice assistant dropdown, and an integrated chatbot panel toggle.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: Dropdown component that lets users switch the app language among six Indian languages (English, Hindi, Marathi, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali) using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, Footer, EmergencySecurityButton, Toaster, and a router Outlet into a full-height flex column.
A toggle button group that allows users to select or deselect a life-stage mode (Youth, Family, Senior, Rural) stored in LifeStageContext.
frontend/src/components/LoanCalculatorSe: Interactive EMI calculator section with sliders for loan amount, interest rate, and term; computes and displays monthly EMI, total payment, and total interest in real time.
frontend/src/components/motion/LoadingDo: A three-dot animated loading indicator component that renders static dots when the user prefers reduced motion.
frontend/src/components/motion/MotionRev: A scroll-triggered reveal animation component using IntersectionObserver that fades and translates children into view, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/motion/RouteTran: A wrapper component that applies a CSS route-transition class to its children during page navigation, skipping animation when reduced motion is preferred.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Listens to browser online/offline events and shows a fixed destructive alert banner at the bottom-left when the user loses network connectivity.
frontend/src/components/ProtectionSecuri: A React component that displays an insurance product hub with expandable cards for health, life, senior, micro, and crop insurance, along with a protection assessment quiz and a claim process walkthrough.
frontend/src/components/RuralEmpowerment: A React section component showcasing rural banking features (low data mode, voice banking, SMS banking, government scheme tracker, micro-loans, and crop insurance) with layout adapting to rural life stage context.
frontend/src/components/SeniorSafeMode.t: A React section component for senior citizens offering accessibility controls (large font, high contrast), pension/savings info, fraud alerts, and an account freeze dialog, adapting its layout based on the senior life stage context.
frontend/src/components/StatsRow.tsx: A statistic banner component that displays four key bank metrics (customers, branches, years of trust, satisfaction) with icons, animating the numbers when the section scrolls into view.
frontend/src/components/TrustSecuritySec: A React section component presenting six trust and security credentials (RBI regulation, encryption, DICGC insurance, ISO certification, fraud monitoring, instant alerts) as a responsive card grid with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/VoiceAssistant.t: A React component that integrates the Web Speech API to listen for voice commands and respond with text-to-speech answers about the bank's products and life-stage banking features.
frontend/src/components/VoiceAssistantDr: A dropdown voice assistant component for DSOUZA Bank that supports speech recognition and text-to-speech in multiple Indian languages, providing scripted banking responses based on recognized keywords.
frontend/src/components/YouthDreamBuilde: A youth-focused banking section component featuring savings goal tracking, gamified badges, an investment step guide, and an interactive credit score simulator.
frontend/src/contexts/AccessibilityConte: Provides a React context for managing font size and high-contrast mode preferences, persisting settings to localStorage and applying corresponding CSS classes to the document root.
Provides a React context for selecting a user experience mode (digital, rural, senior, business), persisting the choice to localStorage and toggling a senior-mode CSS class on the body.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the active UI language across six Indian languages, including a translation lookup function with keys for navigation, chatbot, and common strings.
frontend/src/contexts/LifeStageContext.t: Provides a React context for tracking the user's selected life stage (youth, family, senior, rural), persisting it to localStorage and applying a corresponding CSS mode class to the document root.
frontend/src/contexts/VoiceGuidanceConte: Provides a React context for enabling/disabling browser-based text-to-speech voice guidance, exposing speak and stop controls with speaking state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both authenticated (Internet Identity) and anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useInViewOnce.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to track when an element enters the viewport for the first time, with support for reduced motion preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Custom hook that listens to the OS-level 'prefers-reduced-motion' media query and returns a boolean indicating the user's preference.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed for this static informational website.
frontend/src/hooks/useTTS.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech API's SpeechSynthesis to provide text-to-speech functionality with speak, stop, pause, and resume controls.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a lavender-themed design system with CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, Tailwind base layers, and glassmorphism utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/speechTypes.ts: Shared TypeScript type declarations for the Web Speech API (SpeechRecognition), serving as a single source of truth to avoid duplicate global augmentations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page for DSOUZA Bank displaying company values, mission/vision, and historical milestones using animated MotionReveal components.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page featuring contact info cards and a simulated contact form with loading state and toast notification on submission.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page for DSOUZA Bank featuring a hero section, feature highlights, testimonials, loan calculator, and life-stage-specific components (Youth, Family, Senior, Rural) rendered based on the active LifeStage context.
frontend/src/pages/NeoPage.tsx: NEO digital banking platform page showcasing AI, voice banking, analytics, and security features, with life-stage-specific capability lists and conditional rendering of life-stage components.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Tabbed services catalog page organizing banking products (personal, loans, investments, business, insurance, digital) into filterable category sections with feature lists and badges.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a custom lavender color palette, high-contrast ink tokens, premium typography, custom shadows, border radii, and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the DSOUZA AI Banking Platform's architecture, completed features, and three pending change requests focused on header cleanup and site-wide high-contrast text improvements.
